caption: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a striped purple and white button-down shirt and a black over-the-ear headset with a microphone, is speaking. She is positioned in an indoor setting against a light-colored wall and a pale yellow curtain with a sliver of blue fabric visible on the left. The text "Nancy Ramya" is displayed in the lower-left corner of each shot. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains centered in the frame, facing forward. As the scene progresses, her facial expressions change as she speaks, with her mouth opening and closing and her eyes shifting slightly. The background and her clothing remain static, and no other people or objects are visible in the scene.
